title: fraxinus oxyphylla subsp. montagnei
intro: Fraxinus oxyphylla subsp. montagnei, also known as Montagne's Ash, is a subspecies of the Fraxinus oxyphylla tree, native to certain regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Fraxinus oxyphylla subsp. montagnei include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Fraxinus oxyphylla subsp. montagnei can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
